violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (Deli slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2025

Ready to eat packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. New Violation. Correct By: 08/07/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. PIC has food safety manager certificate available. Plans to visit RIDOH week of 7/8/2024. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/14/2024

The door to the outside, located in the (back of the store), is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/09/2024

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Corrective action, establishment employs a food safety manager. No food safety manager is registered to location with RIDOH. New Violation. Correct By: 06/25/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/25/2024

(Sandwiches) was observed held at (47) degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Sandwiches were voluntarily disposed of at the time of inspection. Ambient of the unit was held at 47 degrees with shade up, and 38 degrees with the shade down. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/25/2024

(Cheese) was observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. PIC correctly date marked cheese at the time on inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/25/2024

Packaged salads in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. New Violation. Correct By: 07/02/2024

The door to the outside, located in the (back of the store), is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 07/09/2024

(Food and Utensils) were observed stored on the floor in the (walk in cooler and storage area). Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. PIC removed food and utensils off the floors during the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/25/2024
